mkdir -p /usr/ports/lang/xsb/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/lang/xsb/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/lang/xsb/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/lang/xsb/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	xsb
X# Date created:		29 Jul 2001
X# Whom:			Christopher Rued
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	XSB
XPORTVERSION=	2.4
XCATEGORIES=	lang
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR= xsb
X
XMAINTAINER=	c.rued@xsb.com
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/XSB/build
X
XPLIST_SUB+=     MACHINE_ARCH=${MACHINE_ARCH} OPSYS=${OPSYS:S/BSD/bsd/g:S/F/f/g:S/O/o/g:S/N/n/g}
X
Xdo-build:
X	@ cd ${WRKSRC} ; \
X	./configure  ; \
X	./makexsb
X
Xdo-install:
X	@ ${CP} -r ${WRKDIR}/XSB ${PREFIX} ; \
X	${LN} -s ${PREFIX}/XSB/docs ${PREFIX}/share/xsb ; \
X	${ECHO} XSB is now installed. ; \
X	${ECHO} To run it, execute ${PREFIX}/XSB/bin/xsb ; \
X	${ECHO} The user manual is in ${PREFIX}/share/xsb
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-/usr/ports/lang/xsb/Makefile

XXSB is a Logic Programming and Deductive Database system for Unix and
XWindows. It is being developed at The Computer Science Department,
XSUNY Stony Brook (http://www.cs.sunysb.edu/), in collaboration with
XKatholieke Universiteit Leuven (http://www.kuleuven.ac.be/),
XUniversidade Nova de Lisboa (http://www.unl.pt/), and Uppsala
XUniversitet (http://www.uu.se/).
X
XOne innovation of XSB is its use of tabled resolution.  Tabled
Xresolution is useful for recursive query computation, allowing
Xprograms to terminate correctly in many cases where Prolog does
Xnot. Users interested in Parsing, Program Analysis, Model-checking,
XData Mining and Diagnosis may benefit from XSB.
X
XWWW: http://xsb.sourceforge.net/
END-of-/usr/ports/lang/xsb/pkg-descr

X--- configure.old	Thu Jul  5 12:42:10 2001
X+++ configure	Sun Jul 29 15:51:36 2001
X@@ -1561,7 +1561,7 @@
X # if --with-gcc, take it as a sign of trouble 
X # with gcc and lower optimization levels
X if test -n "$with_gcc" ; then
X-	emuloop_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O4 -fomit-frame-pointer"}
X+	emuloop_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O2 -fomit-frame-pointer"}
X 	trutils_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O1 -fomit-frame-pointer"}
X 	builtins_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O1 -fomit-frame-pointer"}
X 	if test -n "$optimization_level"; then
X@@ -1572,9 +1572,9 @@
X 	CFLAGS="-Wall -ansi -pedantic"
X else
X  case $CC in
X-   gcc) emuloop_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O4 -fomit-frame-pointer"}
X+   gcc) emuloop_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O2 -fomit-frame-pointer"}
X 	trutils_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O1 -fomit-frame-pointer"}
X-	builtins_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O4 -fomit-frame-pointer"}
X+	builtins_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O2 -fomit-frame-pointer"}
X 	if test -n "$optimization_level"; then
X 	   c_inline_level=""
X 	else
X@@ -1583,23 +1583,23 @@
X 	CFLAGS="-Wall -ansi -pedantic"
X 	 ;;
X    cc)	if test "$__sunpro_c" = "no"; then
X-	   emuloop_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O4"}
X-	   trutils_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O4"}
X-	   builtins_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O4"}
X+	   emuloop_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O2"}
X+	   trutils_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O2"}
X+	   builtins_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O2"}
X 	else
X 	   # emuloop_opt_level is the optimization level for emuloop.c
X-	   # Using xO4 would take SunPro more than an hour, hence xO2.
X+	   # Using xO2 would take SunPro more than an hour, hence xO2.
X 	   emuloop_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"xO2"}
X-	   trutils_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"xO4"}
X-	   builtins_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"xO4"}
X+	   trutils_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"xO2"}
X+	   builtins_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"xO2"}
X 	fi
X 	c_inline_level=""
X 	CFLAGS=""
X 	;;
X    acc) # acc also seems to choke on high optimization levels for emuloop.c
X 	emuloop_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O2"}
X-	trutils_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O4"}
X-	builtins_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O4"}
X+	trutils_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O2"}
X+	builtins_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O2"}
X 	c_inline_level=""
X 	CFLAGS="-Xa"
X 	;;
X@@ -3006,16 +3006,16 @@
X #fi
X 
X 
X-# Normally, the optimization level will be O4. 
X+# Normally, the optimization level will be O2. 
X # SGI64 must have O1 and 32 bit SGI's can have O2
X if test "$__sunpro_c" = "no"; then
X    if test "$CC" = "gcc" ; then
X-	c_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O4 -fomit-frame-pointer"}
X+	c_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O2 -fomit-frame-pointer"}
X    else
X-	c_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O4"}
X+	c_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"O2"}
X    fi
X else
X-   c_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"xO4"}
X+   c_opt_level=-${optimization_level-"xO2"}
X fi
X 
X 
END-of-/usr/ports/lang/xsb/files/patch-aa
